sections.projects_subtitle: Tools focused on productivity and utility.
sections.roadmap_tips: Tips support maintenance; they do not fund campaigns.
sections.roadmap_q1_desc: Development and launch of the foundation: XML Translator, CSV Converter, and Lyrics.
sections.roadmap_q2_desc: STZ LABS launch, multi-language support, and themes.
sections.roadmap_q3_desc: Windows base and catalog with eight official plugins released.
sections.roadmap_q4_desc: Future integration to synchronize plugin data and preferences and make the Suite easier to use across different devices.

cards.suite_desc: A lightweight Windows base with media, productivity, and automation tools installed on demand.
cards.xml_desc: Translate game XML files with multiple AI providers (Gemini, DeepL, Azure, Llama), smart glossary, and tag presets to accelerate localization workflows.
cards.lyrics_desc: Minimalist Rainmeter skin. Displays playing song lyrics in a single line over the taskbar. Always on Top.
cards.lyrics_overlay_desc: Installable Windows overlay (no Rainmeter) with synced lyrics via GSMTC + LRCLIB, tray controls, presets, and local cache.
cards.csv_desc: Advanced tool to clean, normalize, and convert CSV contact lists. Ideal for Google Contacts migration.
cards.taskpulse_desc: Minimalist system monitor for Rainmeter. Real-time CPU, GPU, RAM, and Network tracking with HWiNFO integration.
cards.ai_chat_optimizer_desc: Keep long AI chats lighter by hiding or collapsing older messages while preserving the current conversation flow and improving page performance.
cards.mouse_click_desc: Lightweight modern auto-clicker for Windows with hold-to-click mode and live CPS control.
cards.pdf_suite_desc: Desktop suite for merging, reordering, converting, and batch-processing PDFs and images with a modern QML interface.

benefits.efficiency_desc: Tools that get straight to the point. No bloated interfaces, just what's needed to solve the problem.
benefits.local_desc: Real privacy. Your files (XMLs, CSVs) are processed on your machine, with no hidden uploads.
benefits.opensource_desc: Total transparency. Auditable code available on GitHub for community contribution.
benefits.ultralight_desc: Low-level optimized code. No bloatware, no invasive tracking, just pure functionality.
benefits.privacy_desc: Your data stays on your device. Our apps work 100% offline by default design.
benefits.design_desc: Consistent and predictable interface across all products, reducing cognitive load.

cta.title: Join the conversation.
cta.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or just want to chat about dev and productivity? Our Discord is open.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Full transparency on how our software works.
privacy.local_desc: All software developed by STZ LABS (CSV Converter, XML Translator, Lyrics, Suite) is designed to process data locally on your machine. We do not send your files, contacts, or XMLs to proprietary servers.
privacy.extension_desc: The STZ AI Chat Optimizer extension is designed to improve usability and interface clarity in long chats while running locally in the user's browser.
privacy.extension_item_1: The extension uses browser local storage only to save user preferences, such as visible amount, hiding mode, enabled sites, and language/interface settings.
privacy.extension_item_2: It acts on the visual interface of supported pages to hide or collapse older messages and make long conversations easier to navigate.
privacy.extension_item_3: Conversation content is not sent to STZ LABS servers.
privacy.extension_item_4: STZ LABS does not sell or share the user's personal data with third parties through this extension.
privacy.extension_item_5: Optional external links, such as the support page, are opened only when the user clicks them.
privacy.api_desc: Some tools use external services to function:
privacy.api_list_gemini: Google Gemini API: In Game XML Translator, if you choose to use automatic translation, the text is sent directly from your computer to Google's servers. Your API Key is stored locally only.
privacy.api_list_lrclib: LRCLIB: STZ Lyrics queries the public LRCLIB database to display lyrics.
privacy.contact_desc: For technical support or commercial inquiries, contact us exclusively by email at contato@stzlabs.com. We reply within up to 2 business days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Rules for using the site, digital purchases, and support contributions for STZ LABS products.
terms.intro_desc: By accessing this site or using download, purchase, or payment links related to STZ LABS, you agree to these Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy.
terms.services_desc: The STZ LABS website presents in-house software, product pages, documentation, digital download links, and contact channels. Some projects are open source and distributed through official GitHub repositories.
terms.payments_desc: Payments processed in this ecosystem relate to STZ LABS's own digital products and/or voluntary support for the maintenance and improvement of existing software.
terms.payments_item_1: We do not operate a crowdfunding platform, charity fundraising, or payment collection for third parties.
terms.payments_item_2: There is no promise of financial return, equity participation, or investment.
terms.payments_item_3: Optional contributions do not create an obligation to deliver a future product beyond what is described on the page or offer.
terms.payments_item_4: The description shown at checkout or on the product page prevails in identifying what the payment is for.
terms.delivery_desc: Our products are delivered digitally, usually through direct download or official links (such as GitHub Releases). We do not ship physical goods.
terms.refunds_desc: Refund requests, duplicate charges, or delivery failures may be reviewed by email. When applicable, the review considers the product type, digital delivery method, and transaction history.
terms.license_desc: Each software product may have its own license (for example, GPL-3.0). Use, redistribution, and modification of each project follow the license published in its repository or package.
terms.acceptable_use_desc: You agree not to use the site, downloads, or software for illegal or abusive purposes, fraud, infringement of third-party rights, or activities that compromise service security.
terms.third_party_desc: Some features depend on third-party services such as GitHub, Stripe, Google Gemini API, LRCLIB, Rainmeter, and WebNowPlaying. Use of those services is also subject to their own terms and policies.
terms.support_desc: For technical support or commercial inquiries, contact us exclusively by email at contato@stzlabs.com. We reply within up to 2 business days.
terms.liability_desc: Except where required by law, software and content are provided as is. STZ LABS does not guarantee compatibility with all environments and is not liable for indirect damages arising from use.
terms.changes_desc: STZ LABS may update these Terms to reflect changes to the site, products, payment methods, or legal requirements. The current version will be published on this page with an updated date.
terms.law_desc: These Terms are interpreted under the laws applicable to the site operator and the transactions carried out, without prejudice to mandatory consumer rights provided by law.

support.title: Support / Tips
support.subtitle: Tips are voluntary contributions to support maintenance of existing software. This is not a crowdfunding campaign. No goals, no rewards, and no future promises. Software is available now and delivered digitally via official download links (GitHub Releases).
support.delivery: Delivery: immediate digital download via official links (GitHub Releases).
support.payment_flow: Choose a voluntary support method for maintaining the software already available.
support.modal_subtitle: Choose a voluntary support option. No crowdfunding, rewards, or future promises.
support.kofi_text: A quick and direct option to support the work behind STZ Labs.
support.mercado_pago_text: Choose a fixed amount or use the free amount option.

ai_chat_optimizer.title: STZ Ai Chat Optimizer
ai_chat_optimizer.description: Keep long AI chats lighter by hiding or collapsing older messages while preserving the current conversation flow and improving page performance.

features.hide_desc: Hide or collapse older messages to reduce the visual weight of long conversations.
features.flow_desc: Keeps the active part of the conversation clear and easy to follow without breaking recent context.
features.sites_desc: Designed to work on supported interfaces such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude with consistent behavior.
features.local_desc: Adjusts the interface directly in the browser and stores local preferences without relying on STZ LABS servers.

showcase.cover_desc: Lightweight browser extension designed to keep long AI chats (ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude) running fast by collapsing or hiding older messages to improve page performance and focus.
showcase.screenshot_1_desc: Easily manage collapsing rules through a simple, intuitive browser popup menu, persisting preferences locally on your storage.

mouse_click.title: AutoClicker Pro
mouse_click.description: Lightweight modern auto-clicker for Windows with hold-to-click mode and live CPS control.

features.ui_desc: Clean CustomTkinter UI with fast, responsive controls.
features.cps_desc: Adjust clicks per second in real time.
features.hold_desc: Only clicks while you keep the button pressed.
features.hook_desc: Low-level hook separates physical and injected clicks.
features.hotkey_desc: Toggle via middle click or configurable hotkey.
features.tray_desc: Minimize to tray to keep your desktop clean.

game_xml.title: STZ XML Translator
game_xml.description: The definitive tool for modders and localization teams. Translate game XML files with multiple AI providers, smart glossary, and Tag Presets to accelerate your workflow.

features.ai_desc: Supports Gemini, Google Translate, DeepL, Microsoft Azure, local Llama 3, and Ollama — pick the ideal provider for each project.
features.integrity_desc: The extraction and injection algorithm meticulously preserves node order, attributes, and comments. Your game won't break.
features.glossary_desc: Maintain term consistency (proper names, locations, items) across multiple files with the built-in glossary manager.
features.ui_desc: Choose between dark, light, and warm themes. The interface is localized in English, Spanish, French, and Portuguese.
features.progress_desc: Visually track the translation status of each file and the project as a whole, with automatic checkpointing.
features.export_desc: Save Parent/Target Tag combinations as reusable presets. Export with structural validation and JSON/CSV backup.

showcase.themes_desc: Switch between dark, warm, and light themes without restarting. The interface is fully localized in English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, and Japanese.
showcase.providers_desc: Choose from Gemini, Google Translate (free), DeepL, Microsoft Azure, local Llama 3, or local Ollama — switch providers without losing session progress.
showcase.tagpresets_desc: Save Parent Tag + Target Tag combinations with a name and linked file. Apply in one click to resume any game XML type without reconfiguring.
showcase.settings_desc: The side panel centralizes translation backup (JSON/CSV), Tag Preset import, and interface theme selection — all in one place.
showcase.glossary_desc: Register fixed terms — character names, locations, items — that should not be auto-translated, ensuring consistency across all project files.

lyrics.title: STZ Lyrics [Rainmeter Skin]
lyrics.description: Transform your taskbar with minimalist, perfectly synced song lyrics. Simple, lightweight, and fully customizable.

features.sync_desc: Uses the massive LRCLIB.net database to fetch line-by-line synced lyrics for your favorite songs.
features.design_desc: An elegant single line floating above your taskbar, showing only what matters at the exact moment.
features.custom_desc: Intuitive settings panel to adjust fonts, sizes, colors, shadows, and window dimensions.
features.delay_desc: Audio ahead? Use the built-in offset control to adjust lyric timing in real-time.
features.wnp_desc: Robust support for modern players (Spotify, YouTube, SoundCloud) via browser extension.
features.top_desc: Can be configured to remain always visible, ensuring you never miss a verse.

showcase.cover_desc: STZ Lyrics is designed to blend into your taskbar, displaying song lyrics subtly without interfering with your daily tasks.
showcase.screenshot_1_desc: Fetches real-time synced lyrics directly from LRCLIB, covering thousands of songs with constant updates.
showcase.screenshot_2_desc: Modify colors, fonts, sizes, and alignments to perfectly match your operating system's visual theme.
showcase.screenshot_3_desc: Control and compensate for potential synced lyric delays directly on the bar with quick mouse clicks.

lyrics_overlay.title: STZ Lyrics Overlay
lyrics_overlay.description: A synced-lyrics overlay for Windows, rebuilt in Python and independent from Rainmeter. It uses GSMTC to detect the current media session and LRCLIB to fetch lyrics when available.

features.overlay_desc: Frameless transparent window with click-through support, optional snap to screen edge/taskbar, and always-on-top mode.
features.sync_desc: Reads the Windows media session (GSMTC) and fetches lyrics from LRCLIB, with incremental synchronization when synced LRC lyrics are available.
features.controls_desc: System tray icon with quick actions to show/hide the overlay, toggle click-through, reload lyrics/config, and open the cache folder.
features.presets_desc: Supports layout presets such as Context (2+2), with per-preset preferences for position, lyric color, always-on-top, and animation.
features.smoothing_desc: A local smoothing clock reduces jitter/freezes reported by some players and improves lyric/UI timing fluidity.
features.cache_desc: Persistent LRU lyrics cache with index.json, local logs/cache folders, and an optional Start with Windows setting.

showcase.cover_desc: Sleek, frameless window floating above your desktop or games, supporting opacity control and smart positioning.
showcase.screenshot_1_desc: Natively syncs with the Windows Global System Media Transport Controls (GSMTC), tracking tracks from Spotify, YouTube, and browsers.
showcase.screenshot_2_desc: Quickly switch between various pre-configured aesthetic styles, dynamically changing font colors, opacities, and layouts.
showcase.screenshot_3_desc: Manage all configurations and shortcuts via the system tray icon, with automatic lyric caching for offline use.

csv_converter.title: STZ CSV Converter
csv_converter.description: Smart cleaning, normalization, and conversion of contact lists. Prepare your data for Google Contacts with surgical precision.

features.clean_desc: Removes invalid characters, formats phone numbers (IDD), and standardizes names automatically.
features.dedup_desc: Detects and merges duplicate contacts based on phone numbers, avoiding clutter in your address book.
features.mapping_desc: Visual interface to map columns from your original CSV to expected fields (Name, Phone, Tags).
features.report_desc: Generates a full JSON report with statistics, warnings, and suspicious contacts list after each processing.
features.ui_desc: Fluid and responsive user experience, with background processing so the interface doesn't freeze.
features.google_desc: Focused on generating perfectly formatted files for direct import into Google Contacts.

showcase.cover_desc: A smooth experience developed with PySide6 and QML, featuring fluid transitions and clean design optimized for fast data workflows.
showcase.screenshot_1_desc: Visually select and map which columns from your original CSV match Name, Phone, Email, and Tags for Google Contacts.
showcase.screenshot_2_desc: Process entire contact lists by removing duplicate entries and invalid numbers, generating a comprehensive post-execution cleanup report.

taskpulse.title: STZ TaskPulse
taskpulse.description: The pulse of your hardware on your desktop. Real-time monitoring of vital resources with minimalist cyberpunk aesthetics.

features.monitor_desc: Track CPU usage, GPU (via HWiNFO), RAM memory, and network traffic (Download/Upload) instantly.
features.design_desc: Clean look and modern typography that integrates perfectly into any setup, without visual pollution.
features.clock_desc: Date and time highlighted with easy-to-read font, eliminating the need for extra widgets.
features.hwinfo_desc: Precise reading of advanced hardware sensors via the HWiNFO plugin for Rainmeter.
features.lightweight_desc: Negligible resource consumption. Your PC focuses on the game or work, not the monitoring.
features.custom_desc: Structured code and clear variables allow you to easily adjust colors, sizes, and sensors.

showcase.cover_desc: STZ TaskPulse integrates seamlessly into your desktop, offering a cyberpunk status bar without cluttering your setup.
showcase.screenshot_1_desc: Easily track CPU, GPU, RAM usage, and network traffic (Download and Upload) instantly.
showcase.screenshot_2_desc: Elegant design highlighting date and time with modern typography, along with system uptime tracking.

mouse_tester_tool.page_desc: Single area to test left, middle, and right clicks, detect very fast double clicks, and keep a clean history of events with intervals between clicks.
mouse_tester_tool.start_clicking: Use the test area to start.
mouse_tester_tool.alert_fast_desc: Last button: {btn}. Interval: {diff}. This may indicate an issue.
mouse_tester_tool.alert_fast_summary: The most recent click was a very fast double click, interval: {diff}.
mouse_tester_tool.summary_click_diff: The last event was {btn} with interval of {diff}.
mouse_tester_tool.status_ready_desc: The panel registers the clicked button, measures intervals and marks in red when a fast double click is detected.

pdf_suite.title: STZ PDF Suite
pdf_suite.description: Windows desktop app that brings PDF and image workflows into a modern Qt Quick/QML interface: merge, reorder, convert, insert pages, and batch-process files.

features.merge_desc: Combine multiple PDFs with drag-and-drop visual ordering before generating the final file.
features.reorder_desc: Reorder PDF pages from individual files or folders while keeping the workflow fast.
features.convert_desc: Convert PDF pages to images, images to PDF, and images between supported formats.
features.insert_desc: Insert pages into existing PDFs without switching tools for common document operations.
features.batch_desc: Run post-processing on images and PDF pages with progress, cancellation, and clear organization.
features.ui_desc: Qt Quick/QML interface with FluentWinUI3 styling and standalone Windows packaging.

showcase.merge_title: Merge from folders or selected files
showcase.merge_desc: The Merge PDF module accepts a full folder or selected files, lets you define the output PDF, enable overwrite, and build the list with drag-and-drop ordering before merging.
showcase.image_pdf_desc: Image to PDF turns folders or selected images into a PDF document, with DPI, JPG quality, output folder, and overwrite controls when needed.
showcase.pdf_image_title: PDF to images with a settings drawer
showcase.pdf_image_desc: PDF to Image exports pages to formats like PNG, with per-PDF subfolders, naming prefix, digit padding, parallel workers, DPI, and light-mode processing.
showcase.image_convert_title: Image conversion with size and quality control
showcase.image_convert_desc: Image Convert converts images between formats, preserves names, can force dimensions, and exposes width, height, DPI, quality, workers, overwrite, and stop-on-error controls.
showcase.pdf_insert_desc: PDF Insert starts from a base PDF, then adds another PDF or images, with an optional output folder, overwrite control, and a stop-on-first-error option.
showcase.post_process_title: Post-processing with before and after preview
showcase.post_process_desc: Post Process applies brightness, contrast, color, gamma, and sharpen adjustments while showing before/after previews plus quality, worker, naming, and parallel-processing controls.
showcase.reorder_desc: Reorder reads input and output folders, sorts by name with natural sort or reverse reading, then applies prefixes, digit padding, and rules for keeping or replacing original files.
